text:
- added STAGEDIR
- converted to use PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST
- removed extra URL from pkg-descr to make portlint happy
- update from version 1.02 to 1.04

  1.0.4

  1.0.3

        * Added trove classifiers.
        * Minor update of the README.
